nasb.text: Then Kenan lived eight hundred and forty years after he became the father of Mahalalel, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: Kenan lived after he fathered Mahalalel 840 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 該南生瑪勒列以後，還活了八百四十年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了八百四十年，生儿育女，

csbs.text: 该南生了玛勒列之后，又活了八百四十年，并且生了其他的儿女。
